mapper.update:
UPDATE osh_practical_website SET
good_count = good_count + 1
mid_count = mid_count + 1
bad_count = bad_count + 1
WHERE id = #{websiteId} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.delete:
UPDATE osh_practical_website SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT w.id, w.name, w.url, w.description, w.logo_url, w.click_count, w.audit_time, w.good_count, w.mid_count, w.bad_count, w.collection_count, w.rating_score, GROUP_CONCAT(t.tag_name ORDER BY t.tag_name SEPARATOR ',') as tags FROM osh_practical_website w LEFT JOIN osh_website_tag_rel wt ON w.id = wt.website_id AND wt.delete_flag = 0 LEFT JOIN osh_website_tag t ON wt.tag_id = t.id AND t.delete_flag = 0 WHERE w.delete_flag = 0 AND w.status = 1
AND w.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryDTO.websiteName}, '%')
AND t.tag_name IN
#{tagName}
GROUP BY w.id, w.name, w.url, w.description, w.logo_url, w.click_count, w.audit_time, w.good_count, w.mid_count, w.bad_count, w.collection_count, w.rating_score ORDER BY w.rating_score DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE osh_practical_website SET good_count = good_count + ( CASE WHEN #{oldRatingType} = 1 THEN -1 WHEN #{ratingType} = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), mid_count = mid_count + ( CASE WHEN #{oldRatingType} = 2 THEN -1 WHEN #{ratingType} = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), bad_count = bad_count + ( CASE WHEN #{oldRatingType} = 3 THEN -1 WHEN #{ratingType} = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) WHERE id = #{websiteId} AND delete_flag = 0
